positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical repeating pattern featuring luminous celestial flora and deep-sea bioluminescence elements. The main composition is a central, stylized Moon Lily surrounded by intricate vines, stylized constellations forming geometric frameworks, and abstract, gentle nebulae gradients. Use a color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, ethereal teal, glowing gold accents, and subtle violet. The style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and mystical celestial illustration, ensuring clean, bold silhouettes and high contrast against a slightly darker background. The design must be perfectly tileable and suitable for direct apparel printing, with crisp vector-like lines.
negative: blur, grain, watermark, logo, text, signature, low contrast, asymmetry, messy, dirty, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, poorly rendered
